name: ViewSonic VX2779-HD-PRO 27” 180Hz, IPS, FHD, 1ms, HDR10, FreeSync Gaming Monitor
highlights: GLARE-FREE GAMING: Experience captivating visuals with the OMNI VX2779-HD-PRO monitor. FeaturingSuperClear IPS panel technology, it ensures vibrant, true-to-life colors from every viewingangle. Whether you’re immersed in intense multiplayer gaming or enjoying your favorite videos,this monitor breathes life into every detail.

Full HD: The Full HD resolution (1920 x 1080) ensures a sharp and smooth gameplay experience, even at the highest settings.VESA Mount Compatible. Viewing Angle (H/V) 178°(H)/178°(V). Brightness 250 nits (cd/m2
FAST REFRESH RATE : The incredible 180 Hz refresh rate means that even when the action heats up, your gameplay will be smooth and lag-free, Visual Response Boost for blur free gaming

FREE CLARITY: Boasting a remarkable 1ms (MPRT) response time, the OMNI VX2479-HD-PRO gaming monitor provides gamers with a competitive edge, enabling smooth pixeltransitions between colors to deliver sharp, immersive visuals with minimal ghosting.

SAY GOODBYE TO SCREEN TEARING: Elevate your gaming experience with the OMNI VX2479-HD-PRO monitor, featuring Variable RefreshRate technology. This synchronizes graphics card and monitor output, eliminating screen tearingand delivering fluid graphics for smooth gameplay.
